title: helichrysum retrorsum var. subulatum
intro: Helichrysum retrorsum var. subulatum is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the Everlasting daisy. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum retrorsum var. subulatum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and essential oil forms, which can be applied topically or consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
